seoTitle: Mulloon vs Mullumbimby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mulloon and Mullumbimby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mulloon and Mullumbimby.
heading: Mulloon vs Mullumbimby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mulloon, New South Wales and Mullumbimby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mullumbimby has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mulloon (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mulloon or Mullumbimby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mulloon has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mullumbimby scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mulloon scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Mullumbimby scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mulloon or Mullumbimby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mullumbimby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
